timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Ariadne redesigns the maze with concentric circles on the pad's back, challenging Cobb, who gets stuck and acknowledges her improved design as more suitable.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Ariadne creates a circular maze design that stumps Cobb, demonstrating her ability to innovate beyond traditional grid-based layouts.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: prove her architectural ingenuity under pressure
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: recognized by Cobb as a skilled architect capable of challenging his assumptions
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: the nature of the illegal job remains unclear
evidence_quotes: She GRABS the pad, frustrated... but this time she FLIPS it over and starts drawing on the BLANK CARDBOARD of the back.
He smiles as he sees that she's drawing CIRCLES, creating a maze based on concentric rings.
Cobb takes the pen, starts the maze. This time he gets stuck.
COBB (working the maze) More like it.

relation_updates: gains Cobb's professional respect
auxiliary.persona_anchor: creative problem-solver with confidence in her design instincts

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Ariadne experiences her first shared dream with Cobb, where the environment violently collapses, demonstrating that dream consequences feel real and can physically affect dreamers despite knowing it's a dream.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Ariadne experiences the violent collapse of a shared dream, confirming that physical sensations and dangers in dreams feel real despite knowing they are not.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: understand the reality of shared dreaming
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: accepts that dream environments can produce real physical sensations and threats during immersion
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: how to maintain stability in constructed dream environments
evidence_quotes: Oh my God. We're dreaming.
Stay calm. We're actually asleep in the workshop.
The restaurant VIOLENTLY FRAGMENTS, EXPLODING AND IMPLODING- PARTICLES OF FURNITURE, WALLS, PEOPLE FLYING AROUND-
Ariadne is WIPED FROM HER SEAT BY A MASSIVE BLAST

relation_updates: enters into active collaboration with Cobb
auxiliary.persona_anchor: empirically oriented learner who trusts experience over theory

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Mal, Cobb's projection, attacks Ariadne with a knife in the dream, causing her to scream for help as Cobb tries to intervene, blurring the lines between memory and reality.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Ariadne is targeted by hostile projections in Cobb's dream, culminating in Mal attacking her with a knife, exposing the danger of entering a destabilized subconscious.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: surviving the dream threat
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: fearful and overwhelmed by the violent response of Cobb's subconscious
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Mal's appearance and aggression raise concerns about Cobb's ability to control his own mind
evidence_quotes: PEOPLE around her stop and look at her, hostile.
Ariadne SCREAMS as Mal LUNGES at her with the knife and we—
COBB Mal, no!

relation_updates: experiences Mal as hostile projection
sees Cobb's inability to fully protect her
status_updates: marked as foreign presence by subconscious defenses
auxiliary.persona_anchor: alert to psychological danger and the limits of control in dreams

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Cobb insists on recruiting Eames, a forger in Mombasa, to help with the mission, believing Ariadne will return and need maze-building training.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Ariadne refuses to open her mind to Cobb due to his unresolved trauma and leaves the group, asserting her personal boundaries.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: avoid collaboration with Cobb
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: not currently part of the mission team
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: whether she will return despite Cobb's instability
evidence_quotes: But Cobb's got problems he's tried to bury down there. I'm not going to open my mind to someone like that.
Ariadne gets to her feet. Walks away.

relation_updates: Ariadne distances herself from Cobb
auxiliary.persona_anchor: morally principled and self-protective in the face of psychological risk

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Arthur and Ariadne meet at a table, discussing creation and paradoxical architecture before beginning their work together.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Ariadne returns to the team and resumes her role in dream architecture, acknowledging the unique creative experience of shared dreaming despite her earlier hesitation.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: engage in dream architecture training
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: actively participating in the mission with Arthur
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: how she will handle Cobb's instability upon reintegration
evidence_quotes: I tried not to come.
But there's nothing else quite like it.
No paper, no pens... nothing between you and raw, direct creation.
Shall we take a look at paradoxical architecture?

relation_updates: Ariadne resumes cooperative relationship with Arthur
auxiliary.persona_anchor: committed to the craft despite personal reservations

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Ariadne confronts Cobb about Mal's presence in dreams; Cobb reveals he's accused of her murder, depends on Ariadne's help to reach his children, and appreciates her trust.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Ariadne confronts Cobb about Mal's presence in dreams and learns he is accused of her murder, deepening her understanding of the mission's emotional stakes.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: understanding the risks of subconscious contamination and the emotional burden Cobb carries
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: aware that Cobb is accused of Mal's murder and that her presence in dreams poses a serious threat to the mission
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: whether Cobb can prevent Mal's projections from sabotaging the operation
evidence_quotes: In case you bring Mal in.
You won't build yourself because if you know the maze, then she knows it. And she'd sabotage the operation.
They think I killed her.
Thank you. ARIADNE For what? COBB Not asking whether I did.

relation_updates: gains Cobb's trust
shifts from student to essential ally

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: The team plans to use a 'kick'—a falling sensation—to wake up from multi-layered dreams, with Yusuf's customized sedative enabling responsiveness to the kick while maintaining deep dream stability.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Ariadne reacts with shock upon learning the mission could involve spending ten years of subjective time in a dream, recognizing the severe psychological implications.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: understanding the risks of the mission
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: aware of the extreme subjective duration involved
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: how to endure or manage long subjective dream periods
evidence_quotes: Ariadne asks how much time they're looking at,
Ariadne is stunned at the idea of spending a decade in a dream,

status_updates: increased awareness of dream time dilation

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Cobb reveals to Ariadne that he and Mal were trapped in Limbo for fifty years, where she accepted the dream as reality while he struggled, unable to forget it wasn't real.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Ariadne confronts Cobb about his and Mal's fifty-year entrapment in Limbo, forcing him to admit that Mal accepted the dream as reality while he remained aware it was not real.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Ariadne seeks to understand Cobb's psychological state to assess the mission's safety
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Ariadne shifts from a trusting team member to someone actively monitoring Cobb for signs of subconscious instability
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether Cobb's unresolved trauma will compromise the mission or endanger the team
evidence_quotes: When were you trapped in Limbo?
Ariadne pulls him away from Saito.
Fifty years.

relation_updates: Ariadne challenges Cobb's authority and mental reliability
status_updates: Ariadne recognizes the mission's danger is tied to Cobb's subconscious

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Ariadne urges Cobb to forgive himself to confront his guilt-ridden projection of Mal; Cobb notices a sniper, signaling danger, and calls for Arthur as they must leave.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Ariadne tells Cobb that Mal's breakdown stemmed from her own mind, not his actions, and urges him to forgive himself to prevent his guilt from endangering the team.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: pushing Cobb to confront his projection of Mal for the team's safety
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: positions herself as the voice of psychological integrity in the mission
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: whether Cobb can overcome his guilt in time
evidence_quotes: Then why should you blame yourself?
I'm doing it for the others. They don't know the risk they've taken coming in here with you.

relation_updates: asserts herself as a moral guide to Cobb
status_updates: takes responsibility for team risk awareness
auxiliary.persona_anchor: ethical anchor who prioritizes mental clarity over emotional indulgence

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Cobb rejects Mal's illusion, declaring she's not real despite her complexity; Ariadne intervenes, shooting Mal and kicking Fischer off the roof as reality shifts around them.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Ariadne shoots Mal to stop her attack on Cobb and ejects Fischer from the roof to initiate the kick, taking decisive action when Cobb is immobilized by emotional conflict.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: extract Fischer and pull Cobb back from dissolution
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: assumes control of the extraction sequence, successfully initiating the kick while preventing Mal from further harming Cobb
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: moral weight of using violence in a dream

A SHOT rings out, Mal GRABS her shoulder-
She KICKS Fischer off the roof- AIMS again at Mal-

relation_updates: protects Cobb from Mal's influence through force

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Ariadne, Arthur, and Yusuf share two regulators underwater; Arthur checks Saito and Cobb, finding them lifeless, as Ariadne pulls him away.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Ariadne physically intervenes to pull Arthur away from unresponsive Cobb and Saito, prioritizing the immediate survival of the remaining team members underwater.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: escape the drowning van and survive
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Ariadne, Arthur, and Yusuf survive and begin to exit the submerged van

They are sharing TWO REGULATORS pulled from beneath the front seat.

pulling him away...

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 280、EXT. UNDERNEATH BRIDGE IN THE RAIN - MOMENTS LATER
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Arthur and Ariadne discuss Cobb staying behind to find Saito, not with Mal. Arthur fears Saito is lost, but Ariadne believes he'll be alright.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Ariadne counters Arthur's concern about Cobb and Saito by affirming that Cobb will be alright, offering reassurance during a moment of uncertainty.

timeline_nodes.resulting_state: the team remains together and emotionally grounded despite uncertainty about Cobb and Saito
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Cobb and Saito's survival and return remain uncertain

ARIADNE No. To find Saito.

relation_updates: provides emotional support to Arthur
status_updates: emerges as a stabilizing voice in uncertainty

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Ariadne evolves from a curious architecture student into a pivotal agent of psychological and operational integrity within the dream mission. She begins by proving her architectural skill, then progressively confronts the emotional and ethical complexities of shared dreaming, particularly Cobb's unstable subconscious. Her journey centers on maintaining reality's boundaries, challenging moral compromises, and ultimately rescuing the mission when it collapses into limbo. By the end, she emerges as a grounded, decisive figure who ensures both the success of the operation and Cobb's return to reality.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Cobb, Arthur, and Saito are sedated in a dream state, connected via tubes to a briefcase, while Nash monitors them in a chaotic city amid riots and explosions.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Cobb and Arthur are in a dream where Saito and Mal confront them; Mal shoots Arthur, causing pain in the dream, and Cobb kills Arthur to escape as the dream collapses.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Saito challenges Cobb to perform inception; Arthur argues it's impossible to plant a true idea, but Cobb claims it is possible, though he refuses Saito's offer.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: skeptical strategist and voice of doctrine
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Arthur argues that inception is impossible because the mind can always trace the origin of an implanted idea, using the example of being told not to think about elephants.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: defend established dream-sharing principles
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: maintains belief that true inception cannot be achieved
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: whether an idea can be planted without the subject being able to trace its origin
evidence_quotes: ARTHUR Of course not.
ARTHUR Okay, here's planting an idea: I say to you, \"Don't think about elephants.\"
ARTHUR Right. But it's not your idea because you know I gave it to you.
ARTHUR The subject's mind can always trace the genesis of the idea. True inspiration is impossible to fake.

relation_updates: challenges Saito's proposition while aligning with Cobb on operational ethics
status_updates: confronted with a new, high-risk proposition (inception)
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Arthur as doctrinal skeptic and principle enforcer

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Cobb and Arthur explain that dream time moves slower than real time, with five minutes in reality equaling an hour in a dream, and architects design these dream spaces.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Arthur explains the military origin of dream sharing and the time dilation effect, in which five minutes in real time equals one hour in a dream, helping Ariadne grasp the basic rules of shared dreaming.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: demonstrating dream mechanics to Ariadne
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Ariadne becomes aware of the time dilation in dreams and begins to understand how dream sharing functions
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Ariadne's full comprehension of the risks and complexities of dream sharing remains incomplete

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Arthur evolves from a disciplined operational partner to a central architect of the team's most complex mission. He consistently serves as the anchor of procedural integrity, technical precision, and risk assessment, particularly in the face of Cobb's emotional volatility. His role expands from tactical support to mission-critical execution, culminating in his orchestration of the synchronized kick. Throughout, he maintains a grounded, skeptical stance while remaining loyal to the team's objectives and cohesion.

evidence_quotes: How long were you stuck? Cobb pauses before he answers. Looks at Ariadne. COBB Fifty years.

It became impossible for me to live like that.
But not for her? COBB She accepted it. At some point...

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Mal reveals she filed a letter accusing Cobb of threats, ensuring custody of their children if she dies; she jumps, declaring they'll be together, leaving Cobb devastated.

timeline_nodes.resulting_state: emotionally shattered and implicated in Mal's death

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Mal challenges Cobb's grasp on reality, urging him to choose her and their dream children, but Cobb insists on returning to his real children, torn by emotion and guilt.

timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: lingering doubt and guilt about Mal and the nature of reality

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Mal accuses Cobb of infecting her mind and betraying her, urging him to keep his promise and stay with her in their shared world.

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Cobb is a skilled but emotionally fractured extractor haunted by the projection of his deceased wife, Mal, whose presence undermines his missions and mental stability. His journey centers on confronting his guilt over implanting the idea that led to her death, while seeking redemption through a final inception job that promises his return to his children. Over time, he transitions from denial and repression to acceptance and self-forgiveness, ultimately releasing Mal's hold on him in limbo and reclaiming his connection to reality.
